description: A ground-level photograph depicting the interior of a natural and semi-natural mixed forest. The image shows multiple tree trunks, some with textured bark, rising towards a canopy. The forest floor and mid-story are densely covered with vibrant green shrub and bush undergrowth, illustrating the "shrub and bush understoreys" component of a mixed forest. Partially obscured text in the bottom left corner reads "©CNES 2011© SPOT Image".
